dict.string: This application needs access to your microphone to record meeting audio.
This application needs screen recording permission to capture system audio during meetings.
This application needs permission to capture system audio output for meeting transcription and recording.
muesly reads your calendar locally to title recordings and add meeting context to summaries. Nothing is sent to Google or Apple.
muesly reads your calendar locally to title recordings and add meeting context to summaries. Nothing is sent to Google or Apple.
